statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIOKECluster) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIOKECluster) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIOKENodePool) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIOKENodePool) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
MATCH (:OCIOKECluster)-[r:HAS_NODE_POOL]->(:OCIOKENodePool) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
MATCH (:OCIOKENodePool)-[r:CONTAINS_NODE]->(:OCIInstance) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
